programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 207
programme.desc: Amy tells her study partner and best friend that she's in love. Tonee wants to come clean with his feelings for his best friend Ryan.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 211
programme.desc: Hairdresser Luna must hell his best friend Lola how much he likes her. Carleen is readu to let Jessica know her true feelings.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 101
programme.desc: Connor is in love with his best friend Brittanie and must try to convince her that he should be more than her "shopping partner." Gabby reveals her feelings to her best friend Nick.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 114
programme.desc: Bryan and Megan have been best friends for 10 years and he can no longer keep his feeling contained. Kenise thinks that she and James can be more than workout buddies.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 107
programme.desc: Jeremy plans a picnic to confess his deep affection for his best friend Amanda. Self-proclaimed ladies' man Nate thinks he's finally found a girl to make him quit his partying ways.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 104
programme.desc: Alex wants his best friend Anthony to be his first boyfriend. Dan puts years of friendship on the line to confess his feelings to Katie.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 204
programme.desc: Jojo reveals that he loves his best friend, Sydney. Kristen wants to let her best friend Jeremiah know that she has a crush on him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Cube Of Sugar
programme.desc: The IMF team must rescue a U.S. intelligence operative who has top-secret military plans on a microcircuit chip.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Traitor
programme.desc: An American intelligence officer, Hughes, has defected to the enemy with the only copy of an encoded top-secret message.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Psychic
programme.desc: The team must trick a crooked investment promoter into endorsing $80 million in stolen stocks and then getting them back from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Survivors
programme.desc: A grave threat to national security is posed when an enemy agent (Albert Paulsen) kidnaps two of the three key scientists who collectively know the formula for the cobalt bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trek
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force matches wits with a hijacker and a disloyal prison commandant.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler find out the gender of their baby with an at-home test. Mackenzie goes home to Oklahoma to surprise her dad and finds out he's still struggling with depression. (S9, ep15)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Heading into her 3rd trimester, Cheyenne needs Cory to help out more with Ryder but he has other plans. Catelynn is hesitant but Tyler wants to try ketamine therapy. (S9, ep16)

programme.title: Teen Mom: Moving On
programme.desc: Amber and Gary's arguing finally reaches a boiling point, while Catelynn struggles to find a home when her mother moves away. Newly-single mum Maci has a change of heart.

programme.title: Teen Mom: A Little Help
programme.desc: Catelyn chooses adoption during a weekend retreat with other birth mums, while Maci and Ryan reach out for help. Farrah wonders if she should stay home more with her baby.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Standing Up
programme.desc: Maci struggles with resenting her boyfriend, while Catelynn worries her boyfriend's father might go to jail. Amber faces her fears about putting her baby in daycare.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Amber wants to put an end to the fighting and move away from Gary. Farrah can't stand living under her parents' roof anymore. Maci struggles to keep up in school when her son starts walking.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Hermann Goering
programme.desc: Hermann Goering: Hermann Goering was the commander-in-chief of the Luftwaffe and Hitler's designated successor. This is his dark story.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Albert Speer
programme.desc: Albert Speer: The career of Albert Speer, Hitler's architect, is explored in this documentary of dark figures.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler: The film explores the roots of Adolf Hitler and traces the story of his life from the town of his birth to his final days.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Heinrich Himmler
programme.desc: Heinrich Himmler: Largely due to the SS which he led, Himmler, the unsuspecting killer, was the most powerful of all of Hitler's men.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: From The "Protection Squadron" To The SS State.
programme.desc: From the Protection Squadron to the SS State: Trace the rise to power of the SS as we examine several perpetrators. Who was recruited? And why was the SS attractive to men?

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: Heinrich Himmler
programme.desc: Heinrich Himmler: An agriculturalist by trade, he went on to lead the SS and tried to escape responsibility at the end of the war. Who was Heinrich Himmler?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Into The Storm
programme.desc: Bad weather threatens to end the fishing week for the Gloucester fishermen, but while some boats head for home, others decide to take on Mother Nature's wrath.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Mongrel Mob
programme.desc: The Mongrel Mob are New Zealand’s most feared gang. Heavily tattooed, predominantly Maori and extremely dangerous, the mob recruit men who have spent time in jail or proved themselves by committing violent crimes.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Gangs: Yardies
programme.desc: Since the Yardies came on the scene a little over 20 years ago, they have impacted crime statistics and law enforcement agencies in the US and the UK like no other. We take a look at the most disorganised, organised crime syndicate the world has ever seen

programme.title: Wardens: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: C.O.s in Michigan sometimes rely on aerial surveillance to crack down on illegal baiting during the firearm whitetail season..

programme.title: Wardens: Long Day
programme.desc: Game Warden John Lesofski starts his day before sunrise and doesn't wrap up until well past sunset.

programme.title: Wardens: Sturgeon Spearing
programme.desc: Michigan's District 3 is home to the state's only sturgeon spearing season. The limit is low, but the reward can be a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Wardens: U.P. Snowmobile Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers in the U.P. have a lengthy snowmobile season to patrol. From sound checks to safe riding on trails, it's never a dull day in the snow.

programme.title: Wardens: Shining Surveillance Part 1
programme.desc: There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens: Shining Surveillance Part 2
programme.desc: There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens: Illegal Blinds
programme.desc: Hunting blinds can not be left on state land year-round. When officers find blinds that need to be removed, they search high and low for the owners.

programme.title: Wardens: Bears in the U.P.
programme.desc: It can take 7 years to draw a bear tag in Michigan's U.P. Conservation Officers make sure everyone plays by the same rules, so no one has an advantage.

programme.title: Wardens: Best of: Michigan Whitetail Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan's archery deer season lasts 77 days and the regular firearm season is 16 days long. Over that time period, C.O.'s use a variety of tactics to make sure everyone is playing by the rules.

programme.title: UFO Hunters II: Tales from the universe
programme.desc: Italian ufologists explore alien evidence in history & folklore. Have we been watched since ancient times?

programme.title: Alien from Area 51
programme.desc: Footage of a dead alien from a crashed UFO in Roswell, NM and moved to Area 51 shocked the world. The time is coming for alien intervention on Earth whether we are ready or not.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
programme.desc: Linda Napolitano's 1989 alien abduction is the abduction case of the century.

programme.title: 30 Insane UFO Encounters
programme.desc: A review of the 30 most insane UFO encounters for your eyes delight and its up to you to make your own mind up, if these amazing encounters could be the real deal or one big elaborate hoax

programme.title: Ancient Alien Question
programme.desc: Join Philip Coppens, star of the History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series, as he provides proof that UFO's helmed by Extraterrestrials from other worlds came to Earth millennia ago.

programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Greatest: Best of Season V WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Legends of Poker

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duelist For Hire
programme.desc: When Yusei heads to a tumbleweed town at the request of some locals, he quickly finds himself in the middle of two feuding families - with his old friend Kalin right there with him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Showdown at Sundown: Part I
programme.desc: When Yusei challenges Kalin to a duel, he hopes to save his old acquaintance from a terrible fate. However, the dueling gets dicey when it becomes clear that Kalin doesn't necessarily want to be saved!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Showdown at Sundown: Part II
programme.desc: As Yusei continues to duel his best to save Kalin from a most unhappy ending, he suddenly finds himself double crossed by his supposed allies and in desperate need of some saving of his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Race to Escape: Part I
programme.desc: After being double crossed and sent to the mines by his supposed allies, Yusei hatches a plan to escape. Can Yusei find a way out, or will he and Kalin be forced to work the mines forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Race to Escape: Part II
programme.desc: It's a high-speed minecart chase as Kalin and Yusei scramble to rescue Sergio's family from the clutches of the Crash Town mine. When Lawton and his goons gain up on the fleeing family, things take a heartbreaking turn.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash at Crash Town: Part I
programme.desc: The sinister Lawton has captured West and Nico and gained control of Crash Town, but Yusei and Kalin have no intention of letting him get away with it. It's the ultimate showdown as the dueling duo confront Lawton in a winner-takes-all battle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash at Crash Town: Part II
programme.desc: As the clash between Lawton, Yusei and Kalin comes to a climactic close, Yusei and Kalin must figure out a way to defeat Lawton before his deck destroys their dreams of freeing everyone in the mines.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Question of the Card
programme.desc: When Sherry breaks into a city building in search of answers about a very special duel card, she finds a lot more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Keeping a Promise: Part I
programme.desc: When Crow looks to avenge a missing colleague, he ends up finding an old friend who turns out not to be what he seems.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Keeping a Promise: Part II
programme.desc: Crow takes on an old friend in a duel to determine the truth about a colleague's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Natural Instincts: Part I
programme.desc: A little fender bender turns into a friendly duel when Crow smashes into one of Team Unicorn's duelists on the tournament practice lanes only this was no accident and Team Unicorn's intentions are anything but friendly.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Dear Diary

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Show Must Go On

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold meet a space alien who has crash-landed in Birmingham and who has a pet tickle-hi-puss that likes to crawl up Penfold's trouser legs. However, the pet gets loose and whenever there is some physical impact, it multiplies.

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.desc: This week they're in the South West of the country taking on two sets of hapless house hunters.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Arthur: The Agent of Change/D.W. Unties the Knot
programme.desc: The latest animated hit movie about a boy and his truck has left Muffy and Francine disappointed. Why doesn't there seem to be any cool female characters on screen? After watching "The Wedding Channel," D.W. wants to get married!

programme.title: Arthur: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Arthur is completely riveted by a book and can't wait to see how it ends. But the last few pages are missing! Now what? For D.W., there's nothing better than getting her own way--that is, until all her friends stop playing with her.

programme.title: Arthur: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Arthur: Pick a Car, Any Car/Jenna's Bedtime Blues
programme.desc: The family car is broken, and so is Arthur's heart. How can Mom and Dad even think of replacing it? It’s Muffy's annual slumber party, and Jenna is finally invited! But what if the other girls discover that she's an occasional bed-wetter?

programme.title: Arthur: Meek For A Week/Arthur, World's Greatest Gleeper
programme.desc: Muffy bets Francine she can't be nice to everyone for a whole week--and soon wishes she hadn't. Next, Arthur didn't mean to tell a lie, he just got stuck in a sort of fib, because he thought it was cool to be a Gleeper.

programme.title: Arthur: The Pageant Pickle/Some Assembly Required
programme.desc: School is almost out and Arthur can hardly wait for those lazy summer days by Muffy's pool. Nothing could ruin such a happy time of year, except maybe D.W.'s Spring Pageant! And then D.W. can't wait to test out her new play set!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Babysits/Arthur's Cousin Catastrophe
programme.desc: You think running a marathon is hard? Try babysitting for the Terrible Tibble Twins. Next, Arthur's family is hosting the once-a-year-is-more-than-enough family reunion. But a major thunderstorm turns this into a reunion to remember.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play It Safe!
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Easy as ABC
programme.desc: When Baby Bop uses the caboose mailbox to deliver a special invitation to her tea party, she discovers that no one can read her handwriting. Barney and his friends find creative ways to help her learn her ABCs!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Mother Goose - Fun With Reading
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that "The Land of Mother Goose" truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! Parts of their rhymes are missing! When Mother Goose arrives, she fixes the problem.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. After some advice from Barney, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Rabbits - Listen
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Fury
programme.desc: The Autobots begin the search for the missing Cyber Planet Key, but there about to have bigger problems on hand as Megatron is resurrected into the mighty Galvatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: City
programme.desc: Optimus and company rescue Bud and the Minicons, but Ransack and Crumplezone will do everything possible to prevent them from finding the Cyber Planet Key.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ambush
programme.desc: The Autobots divide into teams and journeys to the depths of Giant Planet. However, they face a difficult battle against an attack from a strange underground structure and Decepticon.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Challenge
programme.desc: The black hole expands even further and the crisis has approached Jungle Planet. Leobreaker and Snarl wager the leader's throne and challenge Scourge. Meanwhile Lori discovers an image that depicts the past when Giant Planet was concealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Scourge
programme.desc: Although Scourge is the winner of the fight, Scourge's emotion causes him to hesitate. Among such, he encounters by chance Bud, who has formed the Mini-Con Recon Team. Meanwhile, the Cybertron Defense Team shifts into action and takes on Galvatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Optimus
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons finally reach the lowest depths of Giant Planet. Coby and Landmine head to the spaceship Lemuria where the Planet Key is located.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Showdown
programme.desc: Starscream and Galvatron battle for possession of the Omega Lock and the four Planet Keys. Though the Autobots try to intervene, Soundwave and Sideways get in their way and hope to see the battle through to the end.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Guardian
programme.desc: Wing Saber hurries to the space bridge in the sky. However, he was not there in time and the space bridge begins to fall apart due to the battle that had just occurred. Lori grieves that she cannot return to her home world.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Homecoming
programme.desc: Galvatron uses his might to pull Earth, the Speed Planet, and the Jungle Planet through space bridges forcing all Transformers to unite and fight against him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: End
programme.desc: Optimus approaches Galvatron to take the Omega Lock and Planet Keys. However, Galvatron is drawing out the power of the Planet Keys, and Thundercracker, Thunderblast, Ransack, and Crumplezone grow to giant size.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kathryn and Eric
programme.desc: Expectant parents Kathryn and Eric are ready to trade in his downtown bachelor pad for a family-friendly house in the suburbs. They want a big bright kitchen, formal dining space, cozy living room and a beautiful nursery

programme.title: Property Brothers: Danielle and Chad
programme.desc: Danielle and Chad, and their three rambunctious kids, are sharing a tiny bedroom in his mom’s house. They want a private, detached home with four bedrooms, spacious kitchen, playroom, plus a backyard

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand – on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree and under a cloud. But each time they stand under the cloud it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children go to the woods to see some bluebells. Po is walking in Teletubbyland when a bluebell appears. Po shows Laa-Laa the bluebell and then one by one more and more bluebells appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind the hills to say “Eh-oh!” before watching three children and Andy Brown look in Rock pools for shrimps. Tinky Winky, Dipsy & Laa-Laa look for Po.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children crawling. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies are crawling. Tinky Winky crawled along the path, Dipsy crawled over the hill, Laa-Laa crawled between the trees and Po crawled around the flowers.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Matthew and James help their uncle milk the cows. In Teletubbyland, the Tubby Custard machine isn't working, so they sing a special 'Tubby Custard' song.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance in and out of the trees. The Teletubbies watch Matthew, James and Mark feeding their chickens. There's toast all over Teletubbyland when the Tubby Toaster makes too much toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are walking. They walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes quacking sounds, which Dipsy finds very amusing. He joins the other Teletubbies to watch two children feeding some ducks. In Teletubbyland, Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a game before watching some children playing a game with Alex Pascall. The Teletubbies have fun playing the game of waking and sleeping, before Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies ‘Christmas is a Coming’. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has volunteered to look after the farm whilst Farmer Pickles takes Humpty to a pig show. Bob arrives with Lofty at the crack of dawn whilst Wendy is due later to repair the roof on the barn.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Bentley is organising a winter fair in the town hall square and enlists Bob to help set up the stalls, lights and the centrepiece of the fair – a giant inflatable Santa Claus.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s built a new waterwheel for the old watermill. He’s made it at the yard, but now needs to dismantle it to take it to the mill in sections. Bob needs Benny, Scoop, Lofty and Muck to carry the wheel sections through the marshland to the mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is putting up some new signs in Sunflower Valley to help people find their way round the valley. Meanwhile Dizzy has been asked by Ela Stevenson if she’ll be the ‘walking bus’ and help the children get to school.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race, which Mrs Percival has organised. Trix decides to enter, but unfortunately she practices with fresh eggs and in her usual haste she manages to make a great mess in JJ’s yard.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles wants a fence built around his compost heap, as Scruffty keeps getting into it. Muck is excited at the prospect of such a mucky job. JJ sends Trix up to the farm with the materials.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a marshland walkway with his Dad’s help. Benny hears that the marsh is ‘like a jungle’ and becomes determined to finds some jungle animals like tigers. Every time he spots one, however, it turns out to be something very ordinary.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are replacing some old pipes outside the town hall. Molly, meanwhile, is practicing for her first aid exam with a reluctant JJ as guinea pig. When Wendy calls JJ’s yard to order a special pipe and Molly offers to deliver it.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building a pedestrian crossing. Mrs Percival, meanwhile, has asked Molly to paint a mural of a jungle scene in the school playground.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Wendy and Bob have a very special announcement to make. They are going to fix up an old Houseboat for Wendy to live in. There’s a lot of hard work to be done. They need to make a gang plank, fix solar panels and give it a really good clean.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a plan to accommodate all of the newcomers. He’s designed a kit house that clips together quickly and easily. Bob’s dad Robert comes to the valley to help build the houses, while Mr and Mrs Bentley conduct a survey on the newcomers’ requirements.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s building a ‘drying tunnel’ for drying Annie seaweed. Muck passes Mr Beasley who’s having a spot of bother with his washing. He decides to build Mr Beasley a drying tunnel for his washing.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a new week and a new pairing as Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning hit the road on the hunt for antique treasures. They begin their epic adventure in Ford, aiming for their first auction in Leyburn, North Yorkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning continue their antique adventure with Anita in the lead, having won the first auction. Can Paul catch her up as they go from the steel city of Sheffield, heading for auction in Luddendenfoot, West Yorkshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's an auction apiece for Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning as they reach the halfway point of their Antiques Road Trip. This leg sees them begin in South Cave in the East Riding of Yorkshire, aiming for auction in Twickenham, London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning head for round four at auction and they both have their eyes on the prize. Starting out in Navenby, Lincolnshire they make their way towards the penultimate auction in the Norfolk town of Diss.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for road trippers Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning. There are only a few pounds separating this competitive duo as they begin in Norwich, and head for a nail-biting final auction in Stamford, Licolnshire.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: What Lies Below
programme.desc: When popular high school student Robert Piest disappears after his shift at a local drugstore, police in Des Plaines, Illinois, ask psychic Carol Broman for help.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to the town of Morley to investigate the infamous Morley Market. A place once bustling with people from years gone by, it is now haunted by shadow figures, and they appear to want to make themselves known.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues the investigation at Morley Market and appears to be followed by a spirit person that wants to touch him and distract him from investigating certain parts of the main hall. Will he uncover who this spirit is?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean returns to his former, haunted home. No tenant has ever been able to stay the full term. Sean wants to seek out the spirits once and for all, to finally find out what is haunting his former home.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Sandhole Cottage and appears to be in direct contact with the spirits that haunted any tenants that came to live there. Will he finally get them to rest?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Higher Dead/ucation
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Bowling Green, Kentucky to investigate Western Kentucky University's three stories of death and terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Due Date With Death
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Rochester, New York to investigate the Rochester Public Library's 15 years of claims. There's reason to believe that two deaths associated with the building could be behind the activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: On this Christmas episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS returns to Hartford, Connecticut to investigate the Mark Twain House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hollywood Horror Stories
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Hollywood, California to investigate the infamous Black Dahlia murder at the historic Sowden House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost Mission
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to San Juan Capistrano, California to investigate the San Juan Capistrano Mission.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Prescription For Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Bartonville, Illinois to investigate the Peoria Asylum.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT2
programme.desc: Most Haunted's deadliest investigation, Part 2. Spirits emerging, team's resolve tested as darkness envelops. Growing fear, team's safety at stake. Can they continue?

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and the Most Haunted team are invited to the inner sanctum of the Freemasons to investigate the many ghost sightings at Clifton Hall. Even before the investigation starts the team are faced with some of strange phenomena witnessed by others.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Part two of their investigation into Clifton Hall sees the team splitting with going it alone. For one of the team the night becomes terrifying as they find themselves locked in a room with an unseen force.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: House of Shadows, One Hand in the Till, Teasdale's Motor Car, The Vision and the Grave.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Candlestick, The Diner, From the Agency, The Magic Rose Garden, The Jeep.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Rock and Roll Ears, The Bucket, The Bridesmaid, Voice from the Grave, The Chess Game.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wealthy Widow, The Witness, The Accident, Bad Dreams, Mental.

programme.desc: A nightmare starts when Chris starts renovating his family dream house. A ghost haunts the home. Only with the help of paranormal investigators, priests, psychics, and shamans does Chris figure out a way to protect his family and "evict" the evil spirit.

programme.desc: The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunted Cabinet

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Demons Dwell
programme.desc: Young David suffers from intense nightmares and is physically attacked by an invisible entity.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hungry Ghosts

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has the task of looking after the twins. Pingu has some bad luck while bowling. Pingu and his friend play practical jokes using a fish on a string. Father drives over Pingu's sister's toy pram.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu visits his injured sister in hospital. The class outing takes them to see a sculptor. Pingu accompanies his sister to the nursery. Only Pingu is curious when strangers pass through the village.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Mother and Father wish to go to a concert. Pingu and his sister help with the tedious household chores. Pingu, his sister, and Robby build an enormous snowman. Pingu plays with wooden blocks.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friend go cross-country skiing. Pingu and Robby get up to all sorts of mischief. Pingu and his sister want only fish and cake for supper.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu does not want to go to school and so pretends he is ill. Pingu is inspired to be a painter. Pingu helps his neighbour and is rewarded for his kindness. A seagull steals Pingu's fish.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friends catch a bottle containing a map. Pingu and his sister take the record player outside. A classmate throws a paper airplane, and Pingu gets the blame.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is put out when he loses several games of hide-and-seek. Pingu refuses to help Mother. Pingu asks Father if they can go up the mountain. Pingu goes fishing but promises to be back on time.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu decides that he is too old for toys. Pingu helps his father wipe fresh snow off the car. Pingu has a day off school.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Bottle Shock
programme.desc: The story of the early days of California wine making featuring the now infamous, blind Paris wine tasting of 1976 that has come to be known as "Judgment of Paris". Feat: Chris Pine, Alan Rickman & Bill Pullman.

programme.title: Memoirs Of An Invisible Man
programme.desc: When a government experiment goes awry it renders an innocent bystander invisible.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: What Happens In Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly get married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Johnny Behan Falls in Love
programme.desc: Wyatt finds himself in the awkward position of having to help crooked Sheriff Behan.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Casey and the Clowns
programme.desc: Earp prepares for trouble when a group known as the Harlequins is expected to return to town. Although they disguise themselves as clowns, they have sinister intentions.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Doc Holliday Faces Death
programme.desc: Doc Holliday takes a turn for the worse causing Dr. Goodfellow to recommend that Doc cut back on drinking.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Apache Gold
programme.desc: The Clanton gang is selling liquor to the Apaches with Ike and Phin hoping their contact will tell the location of hidden gold rumored to be in a cave.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Good Mule and the Bad Mule
programme.desc: A lie told by a young boy about Shotgun's mule Roscoe kicking him causes a newspaper war between the Nugget and the Epitaph.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Clanton and Cupid
programme.desc: When Old Man Clanton's daughter visits, he tries to persuade her to pursue Wyatt Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Takes the Primrose Path
programme.desc: Chief Natchez fears being blamed for an attack on a wagon train, which was actually carried out by outlaws.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Convict's Revenge
programme.desc: A young man just released from prison is determined to go straight. However, his efforts are being sabotaged by his girlfriend's brother, a gambler who has massive gambling debts.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Until Proven Guilty
programme.desc: Johnny Ringo and Curly Bill Brocius, outraged over crooked Sheriff Behan taxing the money they make on some of their illegal activities enlist Doc Holliday to frame the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: In this tense action-thriller starring Ray Winstone and Temuera Morrison, Arjan, an ex-soldier, is hired to hunt down a fugitive. But what starts out as easy bounty soon turns into a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb
programme.desc: Jack Hunter is abducted blindfolded to a Turkish US base to be recruited by the NSA, told his mentor was killed because Albert Littmann's Russian mob employer Doridanov want the ancient Osiris-weapon.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn’t about to let a witness be murdered on his watch.

programme.title: Mortal Fear
programme.desc: Based on the novel. A crazed killer is infecting healthy patients with a disease that makes them age dramatically. No one can identify what the virus contains, and in the meantime they must race to stop the killer.

programme.title: Hacker
programme.desc: As a teenage girl, Laura witnessed the arrest of her father, a brilliant hacker. As an adult, Laura has become a hacker to assist in national security.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Freddie has everything--a gorgeous new husband and half ownership of a winery. But when her business partner's wife is murdered, Freddi suspects her partner's new love.

programme.title: Dead at 17
programme.desc: Jason and his friends find themselves in trouble when a girl they are partying with is accidentally killed. In a panic, they hide her body. Worried that he would confess, two of the boys kill Jason and make it look like a suicide.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: A United States Navy destroyer escort participates in a Navy "invisibility" experiment that inadvertently sends two sailors forty years into the future. Starring: Michael Paré, Nancy Allen, Eric Christmas

programme.title: Rise Of The Fellowship
programme.desc: What if The Lord of the Rings wasn’t just a story? What if it happened to you? Randall Dooley and his friends are outcasts at school, spending most of their time playing online games. After Randall is set up for a crime he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Kids From Planet 62F
programme.desc: Four friends find an object with special powers that belongs to two alien kids from the planet 62F. Now they must race to get it back to its rightful owners, but NASA are on their tail and they will stop at nothing to get their hands on it.

programme.title: The BFG: The Original Movie
programme.desc: A young orphan girl, Sophie, gets taken away to a faraway land populated by Giants and Dreams.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: The Chaperone
programme.desc: Ray’s been asked to chaperone a school trip with his daughter Sally’s class. When characters from Ray’s criminal past believe he stole the loot from a bank they robbed, Ray will do whatever it takes to keep his daughter and her class out of harms way.

programme.title: Pudsey The Dog: The Movie
programme.desc: Pudsey The Dog: The Movie is ‘Babe’ meets ‘Marley and Me’ - a cheeky and downright hilarious animal adventure for the whole family! Oh and by the way… there are songs too!

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Monster Squad
programme.desc: Frank and Dracula sign up for music lessons in an attempt to foil the mad musicians who robbed a telethon.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Ultra Witch
programme.desc: Ultra Witch dries up the world's milk supply, but she exposes herself by sending a henchman out for cookies.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Wizard
programme.desc: The Wizard devises a scheme to steal all of the national monuments for his own personal exhibit. Meanwhile, Walter concocts an antidote that works on every poison known to man.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Skull
programme.desc: The Skull decides to resurrect all of the world's villains, beginning with a mummy.

programme.title: The Brain That Wouldn't Die
programme.desc: A doctor experimenting with transplant techniques keeps his girlfriend's head alive when she is decapitated in a car crash, then goes hunting for a new body.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Smooth Criminal
programme.desc: A suave and charming hitman lead the team to uncover a conspiracy.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Untouchable
programme.desc: The team investigate the death of a conspiracy-obsessed woman.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Do Or Die
programme.desc: The team find themselves immersed in the competitive world of overprivileged youth.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: The shooting of an old man looks like an open-and-shut case.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Food For Thought
programme.desc: The team investigate the explosion of a gourmet food truck.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team suspect that a woman's death might be the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body falls from the sky and the team discover it is from a commercial space flight.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Backfire
programme.desc: The team tries to determine the cause of a house fire.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Meltdown
programme.desc: Delko returns to the fold to assist the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Time Bomb
programme.desc: The state's attorney Delko has been working with, is killed by a car bomb.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: All Fall Down
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose, leaving his mark on the chests of his victims.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must look at Miami's elite.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In their attempt to identify the murderer of a has-been boxer who lived among a group of prostitutes who detested him, the CSIs must establish which of several life-threatening acts against him in one night actually killed him.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a blackjack dealer whose estranged husband has ties to a club of UFO believers.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Sara is uneasy about Grissom being reunited with Lady Heather during the CSIs' investigation of her attempted murder by a client she refuses to name.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: As the CSI team comes closer than ever to identifying the miniature killer, Sara mysteriously goes missing, forcing her relationship with Grissom out into the open.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Sara's fate remains in question as the CSI team rushes to find out if she survived an attack by the miniature killer, on the eighth season premiere.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fractured
programme.desc: After a powerful earthquake rocks Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must fix a pinched gas line to prevent a massive explosion.

programme.title: Scorpion: Adaptation
programme.desc: While Team Scorpion works to stop an influx of drugs being smuggled into the country via drones, Walter gives Happy and Toby an ultimatum on their new relationship.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A group of high-school students, who are infused with unique superpowers, harness their abilities in order to save the world.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A group of high-school students, who are infused with unique superpowers, harness their abilities in order to save the world.

programme.title: It's Not Cricket
programme.desc: Kicked out of Army Intelligence, a pair of upper class twits set up as private detectives. The result is refined English chaos.

programme.title: Man of the Moment
programme.desc: A filing clerk becomes a delegate to a Geneva conference and unknowingly uses veto powers for some political decisions.

programme.title: All Over the Town
programme.desc: A powerful advertiser clashes with a newspaper editor when he tries to push through a crooked housing deal.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 1
programme.desc: Allison leaves her job at the D.A.'s office after she's recruited to work for the Lydecker Corporation by another psychic who works there. While enjoying her new job, Allison still regrets leaving the D.A.'s office so suddenly.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2
programme.desc: While at her new job at the Lydecker Corporation, Allison shares the dreams she's been having of the serial killer in Phoenix with Devalos and Scanlon.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3
programme.desc: Allison struggles with her decision to switch jobs. When she continues to have visions about a serial killer she is forced to choose between honoring the contract with her new job and sharing her information with the police.

programme.title: Medium: The Man In The Mirror
programme.desc: After falling into a coma during an investigation, Allison's spirit finds it's way into the body of a man named Todd Emory. Joe and the kids have to adjust to living with Allison's spirit in the body of Todd, who insists on living with them.

programme.title: Medium: The First Bite Is The Deepest
programme.desc: Allison turns to Cynthia Keener (who is now in jail) when she starts dreaming of a former kidnap victim who Cynthia had once rescued.

programme.title: Medium: The Talented Ms. Boddicker
programme.desc: While Allison is coping with Joe's job relocation to San Diego, she dreams about and then subsequently meets a bank teller named Mrs. Boddicker who predicted a robbery at her bank.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU is called in when a mother and her daughter are abducted.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One struggles with a secret that could compromise their drug bust and end Wordy's career.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When Raf, a new recruit, joins Team One, he learns what it means to be a member of the Strategic Response Unit on one of their toughest days of the year forhostage and suicide situations.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Two bombs are set off while Sam, Spike and Raff are responding to a Hot Call at an office building, trapping them and nine civilians inside with a third seemingly non-diffusible bomb.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One has an unusual case when a passenger jet is hijacked by a group demanding the release of a prisoner.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One responds to 911 call where a masked gunman threatens a group of teens and kidnaps one of them.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: After being released from prison after serving 13 years for manslaughter, AJ’s dreams of living a pleasant crime-free life soon come to an end when he discovers his closest childhood friend Jack, has been marked for death.

programme.title: Cold Souls: Cold Souls
programme.desc: Paul is an actor who feels bogged down by his participation in a production of Chekov's play, Vanya.

programme.title: Clockwatchers
programme.desc: The relationship between four female temps all working for the same credit company is threatened with the arrival of a new hire, who lands a permanent position one of the women was vying for.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Hunted
programme.desc: A greedy Hunter sets his sights in the deepest foliage of the Amazon Jungle recklessly trapping as many animals as he can, prepared to sell them to the highest bidders.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Chuck (and Melvin) and the Beanstalker
programme.desc: Questing through the dark, thick "dangerous" forest on a dire search for food, our starving brothers Chuck and Melvin come across an eerie Trading Post where they trade off Chuck's beloved horse Splendour for a bag of magic beans.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Transylvania Express
programme.desc: When surfer dudes Ben and Mike mistakenly travel to Austria instead of Australia, they find themselves aboard the midnight run of the Translyvania Express railway.

programme.desc: Kristin drives out to a small fishing community to investigate a local sighting of a sea monster. / Sixteen year old Simon's fascination with spiders becomes a nightmare when his turn of the century town is infested with arachnids of every variety.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Sharon Sharalike
programme.desc: Selfish eight year old Shauna doesn't like to share, especially with her five year old sister Katie.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Too Cool for School
programme.desc: Junior High School friends Stephanie and Jan hate rules.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Waste Not, Haunt Not

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Trouble in Store
programme.desc: Best friends Derek and Rob love new things.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: All Booked Up

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: So Very Attractive

programme.desc: Eric and Rabbi Glass cancel Matt and Sarah's wedding in protest of their union.

programme.title: 7th Heaven

programme.title: 7th Heaven

programme.desc: The widow and son of a man Jake Kaiser lynched are out to get him (Kevin Hagen appears).

programme.desc: Tom Cassidy, the town drunk, tries to pick a fight with Dan Clell, who has just arrived in Dodge.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A former gunslinger is being bothered by bullies.

programme.title: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A bitter old woman plots to kill Matt as revenge for the death of her brother.

programme.desc: Matt arrests a drifter for robbing and murdering a cattle buyer.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A woman's boyfriend causes trouble for Matt with his constant fits of jealousy.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc is taken hostage by three con artists.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A shamed Japanese banker ritualistically kills himself, and McGarrett want to know why. McGarrett demands answers from a prominent financial consultant and the deceased's assistant when Five-O discovers the pair are involved in an international swindle.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett digs into a 33-year-old mystery when he links a Honolulu murder to a missing, anthropologically valuable human fossil that disappeared in China shortly before Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett's investigation of a murder is thwarted by a computer which has been fed with erroneous information in hopes of diverting the guilt for the crime away from the guilty party.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Three troubled women take up armed robbery aboard scenic tour buses as a moneymaking project. The three women: Dina Hale, a lady with a hidden habit; Fay Scott, the mother of a desperately ill child; Margaret Hudson, an unhappily married housewife.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life as he struggles to recover a list of terrorists on pirated microfilm after he has been injected with a deadly serum.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver matches wits with a brilliant extortionist who has placed a bomb on a ship in a deadly plot to gain several million dollars.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver endures one of his most horrifying experiences as he tries to stop a nuclear reactor from exploding and contaminating a community.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver teams with a beautiful defector when he's asked to identify the double agent responsible for the deaths of three agents.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver meets a gorgeous woman in Bulgaria and falls prey to militiamen after the beauty slips some jewels into his pocket.

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Gil Favor and his ramrod, Rowdy Yates, leave their cattle drive to hunt a half dozen strays and stumble on a woman and her daughter being held prisoner.

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and his ramrod Rowdy Yates leave the herd and race to a nearby town to find doctor for Pete Nolan, who has been badly gored by a steer.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: The Angels help another Angel who has lost her faith find her way back to heaven.

programme.desc: The Angels help a young singer in danger of losing her vocal chords find her true voice.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels try to help fulfill a dying inventor's dream of finishing his invention which uses water instead of coal as a source of energy.

programme.desc: The Angels must intercede when a troubled teen goes on trial for violent behavior as a result of his obsession with a video game.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Abbotsford Killer

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Lethal Investment

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda is tasked with escorting medical ships safely through Drago-Kazov space.

programme.title: Andromeda: Home Fires

programme.title: Andromeda: Into the Labyrinth

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Claire is dead and everyone is dealing with it in their own way. Tess tries to keep her emotions in check, unable to deal with her grief and burdened by survivor’s guilt. Tess’s one grasp on reality is, strangely, the appearance of Claire’s ghost.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Tess is finding it tough going with Stevie. She’s insolent and competitive and as far as Tess is concerned not a team player. When a private investigator turns up looking for Stevie, Tess is convinced she has something to hide.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Six months on from Claire’s death, Tess (Bridie Carter) has thrown herself into her work with an almost manic intensity.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Late at night Tess (Bridie Carter) is woken by a strange noise in the kitchen and discovers Stevie helping herself to a beer from the fridge. Both however are subsequently surprised by a stranger called Jack Blake.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: When Harry (Marshall Napier) offers Alex (Aaron Jeffery) and Nick (Myles Pollard) a partnership deal in Killarney after he dies on the proviso that they give up Wilgul and move back home now, the boys become even more determined to save their farm.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alice and Danny are delighted when the Animal Hospital is given responsibility for the rescue and conservation of animals in the region – it's a big achievement after all their hard work.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are concerned about a missing male giraffe but Du Plessis is confident he can find him. He's as good as his word but they're upset to discover Mara lions have killed the giraffe.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family frantically dig for Charlotte in the rubble, hoping that somehow she has survived. Rowan arrives and takes charge of the situation, directing them to be more methodical in their rescue efforts.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are enjoying being together but agree to keep their relationship under wraps for the moment. However, they're unaware Georgina has heard their every word!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
